title: BoDo
description: Coordinate a team photo in BoDo (Boise Downtown).

title: Rose Garden
description: Coordinate a team photo at the Rose Garden.

title: Ann Morrison Art Piece
description: Coordinate a team photo with an art piece in Ann Morrison Park.

title: Freak Alley
description: Coordinate a team photo in Freak Alley.

title: Downtown Boise
description: Coordinate a team photo somewhere iconic downtown (not BoDo or Freak Alley — pick a new spot).

title: Friendship Bridge
description: Coordinate a team photo on the Friendship Bridge.

title: The Library!
description: Coordinate a team photo at the Boise Public Library.

title: Dirty Little Roddy's
description: Photo of your team having a drink at Dirty Little Roddy's.
bonusCondition: You had to wait in a line to get in

title: Cactus Bar
description: Team photo at Boise's oldest dive bar. Order a round of well shots for full effect.
bonusCondition: Your team squeezed into the photo booth together

title: Tom Grainey's / The Basement
description: Team photo at Tom Grainey's. Upstairs or basement — your call.
bonusCondition: Photo is from the basement dance floor

title: Humpin' Hannah's
description: Team photo at Hannah's. Yes, the bras on the ceiling count as ambiance.
bonusCondition: Someone on the team added a bra to the ceiling collection

title: StrangeLove
description: Team photo inside StrangeLove. The neon helps.
bonusCondition: Photo is at a bottle service table

title: Karma
description: Team photo at Karma. Fishbowl drinks are encouraged but not required.
bonusCondition: Your team is holding a fishbowl in the photo

title: Silly Birch
description: Team photo at Silly Birch. Cheap beer, darts, divey energy.
bonusCondition: Team is mid-darts-game in the photo

title: Pengilly's Saloon
description: Team photo at Pengilly's. Pool tables are calling.
bonusCondition: You beat someone at pool (photo of the win)

title: The Torch Lounge
description: Team photo proving your team made it to The Torch. This is a gentleman's club — act accordingly (or don't).
bonusCondition: Photo includes a tip on the stage

title: Eclipse
description: Team photo proving your team made it to Eclipse near BSU. Boise's topless venue — bring your confidence.
bonusCondition: Someone on the team got a lap dance (photo proof or it didn't happen)

title: Spearmint Rhino
description: Team photo at Spearmint Rhino. The world-famous bikini club. You made it.
bonusCondition: Photo is from VIP or a private suite

title: Sing With Me!
description: Record your team starting a sing-along with strangers. Encouraged artists: Creed, Journey, or Carly Rae Jepsen. Share the video in the group chat.

title: And They Danced…
description: One team member absolutely crushes it on the dance floor. Video shared to group chat.

title: State Capitol Oration
description: Go to the Idaho State Capitol and orate the Gettysburg Address on video. Commitment to delivery matters. Share to group chat.

title: Defying Gravity
description: Find a stranger willing to sing 'Defying Gravity' with your group on video. Lyrics may be provided. Share to group chat.

title: Broadway Moment
description: Tyler sings a song from Little Women to a stranger, OR Courtney sings from Wicked to a stranger. On video. Share to group chat.

title: First Drink / Last Drink
description: Record a video of your ENTIRE team's first drink of the day and last drink of the night. Must be the full team both times. Share both videos to group chat. Good luck.

title: Celebrity Lookalike Autograph
description: Find someone who looks like a celebrity. Get them to sign an autograph as that celebrity and pose for a photo.

title: You My Dog, Dog?
description: Find the most attractive canine companion you can and take a photo together.

title: Politics at the Fort
description: Take a team photo with the most politically dressed person you can find at Treefort.

title: The Bride/Groom's Got Game
description: The bride or groom on your team must collect at least 2 phone numbers or Instagram follows from strangers. Screenshot proof.

title: White-Out
description: Take a group photo with a stranger wearing all white.

title: Backstage Pass
description: Get a photo with a Treefort performer or band member.

title: Hype Machine
description: Give the most over-the-top, genuine compliment to a stranger. Photo of the interaction (video goes to group chat for bonus bragging rights).

title: Married or Not?
description: Find 2 couples of similar age. One must be married, the other not. Take a group photo with both couples — the rival team has to guess which couple is married.

title: Pengilly's Pool Shark
description: Beat someone at pool at Pengilly's. Photo proof of the winning moment.

title: I Make Food Look Fat
description: Submit your most gluttonous, over-the-top bite as a photo.
bonusCondition: You documented every first bite your team took all day as a collage

title: Oh, That's Definitely My Good Side
description: Submit the worst possible photo of a member of your team. Compromising angle, unflattering position — not bad photo quality.

title: The Almanac
description: Text a prediction to someone on your team about something another team member will do later. Upload the text screenshot and the proof photo when it happens.

title: Sidequest King
description: Document Josiah having an exchange with a stranger, or follow him on one of his unexpected journeys. Photo proof (video to group chat).

title: River Break
description: Someone on your team goes into the Boise River. Whoever goes deepest wins the most points for their team. Photo proof required.

title: Freak Alley Fiend
description: Do your best crackhead / fiend impression in Freak Alley. Photo proof (video to group chat for full effect).

title: Human Conveyor Belt
description: A team member crowd surfs. Or attempts to. Photo proof (video to group chat).

title: I'd Buy That for a Dollar
description: Find the strangest piece of merch or art for sale at Treefort. Photo required.
